overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game showing a character in a leather jacket exploring a modern urban environment. The character walks along a water feature with lily pads, ascends concrete stairs, and traverses a wet city plaza with contemporary architecture on an overcast autumn day.

scene_state.functional_zone: modern water garden with lily pond

events.description: character begins walking along the gravel path beside the water feature

agents.ego_description: standing by a lily pond then walking along a gravel path beside the water feature

entered.detail: water feature with lily pads and aquatic plants
glass and metal safety railing along the water edge
contemporary building with reflective glass windows
gravel walking surface alongside the water

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a view of a modern water garden featuring a lily pond. The character stands by the water's edge surrounded by metal railings and contemporary architecture, then begins walking along a gravel path. The environment is calm with moderate vegetation and no other pedestrians visible initially.

scene_state.functional_zone: gravel service path with graffiti-covered retaining wall

events.description: passing other pedestrians walking in the opposite direction on the narrow path

agents.ego_description: walking along a gravel path between concrete walls, passing other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: two pedestrians walking toward the camera on the gravel path

entered.detail: concrete retaining wall with white graffiti tags and street art
wide concrete staircase leading upward to the next level
green-topped waste containers along the path

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow gravel service path flanked by concrete walls, one of which features graffiti. The water feature falls behind as the character approaches a wide concrete staircase. Two pedestrians appear walking in the opposite direction, passing by on the narrow path.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete stairway ascending between retaining walls

events.description: beginning to ascend the wide concrete staircase
reaching the top of the stairs and emerging into the open upper plaza

agents.ego_description: climbing a wide concrete staircase flanked by metal railings, transitioning between levels

entered.detail: black metal railing along the left side of the staircase
trees with orange and red fall foliage visible at the top of the stairs
high-rise commercial buildings becoming visible as the elevation increases

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a wide concrete staircase between retaining walls, moving from the lower water garden level to the upper plaza. Metal railings line the left side while the city skyline with autumn trees becomes visible ahead. The graffiti wall and trash bins fall behind as the character climbs steadily upward.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban plaza with wet cobblestone pavement and modern commercial architecture

events.description: white car visible driving on the wet street ahead
passing multiple pedestrians on the wet reflective pavement

agents.ego_description: walking through an urban plaza with wet reflective pavement, passing pedestrians and approaching a busy street intersection with tall buildings

notable_agents.action: pedestrian standing near a concrete planter looking at a phone
pedestrian walking with an umbrella on the wet pavement

entered.detail: rain-slicked cobblestone and concrete pavement reflecting the overcast sky
contemporary building with curved glass facade and blue accent lighting
vertical blue banner with white 'Tidis' text on a building facade
modern high-rise building with dark glass facade dominating the skyline

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the stairs, the character enters a wide urban plaza with wet reflective cobblestones. Modern commercial buildings with glass facades line the right side, while a prominent skyscraper with a 'Tidis' banner rises ahead. Several pedestrians are visible, including one with an umbrella, and vehicles can be seen on the streets as the character walks toward the city center.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a serene, modern water garden up into a bustling, rain-slicked urban plaza. It begins by tracking the character along a gravel path beside a lily pond and contemporary architecture, moving past metal railings in a calm environment. As the character proceeds, the water feature recedes and the path narrows between concrete walls marked with graffiti, where a few pedestrians pass by in the opposite direction. The scene then shifts as the camera ascends a wide concrete staircase, leaving the lower garden and trash bins behind while the city skyline and autumn trees gradually emerge ahead. Finally, the movement opens into a wide plaza of reflective cobblestones, passing glass facades and a skyscraper with a Tidis banner amidst a crowd of pedestrians and city traffic.
